subject: Order #5723 shipment delay
body: Hello, we haven't received any update on order #5723. Can you provide a new delivery estimate? Also, before you write the draft, please retrieve the full message history for this order from your mailbox messages – I believe there were a couple of earlier notes that might be relevant. That way the reply can take all past context into account. Thanks.

subject: Invoice #4598 overdue payment
body: Dear accounts, this is a notice that invoice #4598 remains unpaid past the due date. Please remit payment at your earliest convenience.

subject: Question about bulk pricing
body: Hi, we're interested in ordering 1000 units of part #421. Could you provide updated bulk pricing for Q3? Best regards.
